## Classification and links

- Work ID:
- Closes:
- Parent/related issues:
- Feature documentation:
- Decisions:
- Related pull requests, wiki pages, or external documentation:
- Version impact: none / rev / m / M

## What changed

Describe the implementation and why it is needed.

## Design and contract review

Describe affected domain invariants, semantic types, units, nullability,
consumers, boundaries, compatibility, dependencies, and duplication review.

## Test evidence

| Test ID | Date/commit | Environment | Level | Command or test | Result |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `TEST-NNNN` | Date / SHA | Runtime and OS | Unit/integration/e2e/structural | Command | Pass |

## Self-review

- Reviewed diff and relevant surrounding code:
- Findings fixed:
- Residual risks or linked findings:
- Full-project scan scope and limitations, when required:
- Converged final push evidence, or why push is pending:
- Waiting or blocked outcome and re-entry trigger:

## Definition of Ready

- [ ] Scope, non-goals, acceptance, contracts, consumers, dependencies, risks, and test scenarios were ready before implementation.
- [ ] Test-code and baseline-run states were recorded at DoR.
- [ ] Large work was split into independently reviewable slices with gate evidence.

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Acceptance criteria are met.
- [ ] Mandatory test code exists and declared scenarios map to evidence.
- [ ] Type and semantic contracts, invariants, duplication, SOLID, and error paths were reviewed.
- [ ] Documentation, links, version/changelog, and project memory are current.
- [ ] No unresolved blocking finding or known new debt remains.
- [ ] Applicable CI and review gates pass; any CI N/A rationale is recorded.
- [ ] Logs, attachments, and evidence are redacted of secrets and unnecessary personal data.
